scripts.compose:up: docker compose up --build -d db server web
scripts.compose:prod:up: docker compose --env-file .env.production -f docker-compose.prod.images.yml up -d db server web
scripts.compose:pull: docker compose -f docker-compose.images.yml pull server web cli
scripts.compose:pull:up: docker compose -f docker-compose.images.yml up -d db server web
scripts.compose:prod:pull: docker compose --env-file .env.production -f docker-compose.prod.images.yml pull server web cli
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @turnkeyai/involute-shared test --run && pnpm --filter @turnkeyai/involute-server test --run && pnpm --filter @turnkeyai/involute test --run && pnpm --filter @turnkeyai/involute-web test --run
